case_title: MACROMEDIA, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION VS. NWNP, INC. A NEVADA CORPORATION et al

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-16-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Appearances:
Eric Shiu, Esq. for Plaintiff Macromedia, Inc.
Plaintiff's witness Boris Pozharny the Credit Supervisor is also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant NWNP, Inc. a Nevado Corp. as follows:
Principal of $25,127.91.
Attorney's fees of $660.00.
Costs of $524.50.
Interest of $2,030.89.
For the total of $28,343.30.
Judgment signed in open court.
